creator: m_josenhans@web.de
text:
When lang/erlang-wx (erlang-wx-17.4.1) is installed, the erlang observer works. 
This applies also for the wx-based erlang debugger GUI. 

Also I could install the lang/erlang-java package, which I have however not tested. Dependency to openjdk was provided.

Erlang emacs support works too.

Great job!!!
